TimeEntry.Title: Onsite Visit
TimeEntry.Notes: Onsite at Promed Financial. Backed up Server's P Drive to an external disk. Connected four computers to the network and configured access to the P Drive. Installed and configured the Ricoh MFP printer on all systems. Client requested a quote for a mid-range desktop, which will be prepared and sent for review. Attempted to configure Scan-to-Email on the Ricoh printer, but it failed due to a TLS compatibility issue. The printer is too old and does not support the required protocols.
